Interface MappedSuperclassType<X>

Type Parameters:
X - The represented mapped superclass type
All Superinterfaces:
IdentifiableType<X>, ManagedType<X>, Type<X>
public interface MappedSuperclassType<X> extends IdentifiableType<X>
An instance of the type MappedSuperclassType represents a mapped superclass type.
Since:
2.0
